steps.title: Identify the critical contrast
steps.content: Great blue herons prefer areas with deep water during breeding season, but small dark herons' habitat selection is unaffected by water depth.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A correctly extends the finding: strategies increasing water depth would attract great blue herons more effectively than small dark herons.

The other choices either contradict the preference pattern, address factors beyond habitat selection, or reference species not discussed.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
